examples.title: Pseudocode: Block Structure
examples.description: Demonstrates the overall structure of a block in a blockchain
examples.code:
CLASS Block
 HEADER
 VERSION (4 bytes)
 PREVIOUS_BLOCK_HASH (32 bytes)
 MERKLE_ROOT (32 bytes)
 TIMESTAMP (4 bytes)
 DIFFICULTY_TARGET (4 bytes)
 NONCE (4 bytes)
 BODY
 TRANSACTION_COUNTER (Variable size)
 TRANSACTIONS (Variable size)
END CLASS
examples.explanation: This pseudocode defines the structure of a block, including its header and body components.

examples.title: Python: Block Class
examples.description: Implements a Block class in Python
examples.explanation: This Python class represents a block and includes methods for calculating the block hash.

examples.title: C: Block Structure
examples.description: Demonstrates the block structure in C
examples.explanation: This C code defines the block structure and includes a function for calculating the block hash.
